channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: France's richest man Arnault hit with €22 million tax assessment
item.description: The issue centers on the complex shareholding structure of LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton SE.

item.title: Seventh film in animated franchise beats fifth installment of another cartoon juggernaut at box office
item.description: The Minions movie opened on Wednesday and earned an estimated $61.4 million in its first five days.

item.title: SK Hynix seeks access to AI investors in $29 billion U.S. listing
item.description: Over the past 12 months, SK Hynix's Korea-listed shares and Micron's stock have gained about 700%.

item.title: Oil and gas tankers cross Hormuz via Oman-side route after U-turns
item.description: Iran has repeatedly stated that vessels should only use the strait via the route it has authorized.
